statuses.point: CRITICAL: CNN used as the core model even though the brief explicitly warned against convolutional networks.
statuses.note: The default scientific path is now src.classical.baselines; CNN training remains only as historical comparison.

statuses.point: CRITICAL: No classical baseline comparison space.
statuses.note: Implemented Logistic Regression, Linear SVM, RBF SVM, KNN, GaussianNB, Random Forest, Gradient Boosted Trees, and non-convolutional MLP.

statuses.point: HIGH: No label alias normalization.
statuses.note: src.data.labels normalizes all aliases listed by the brief at manifest ingestion and preserves label_raw.

statuses.point: HIGH: Spectrogram settings do not follow the guideline settings emphasized in the brief.
statuses.note: APLOSE-inspired presets aplose_512_98 and aplose_256_90 are exposed and now feed deterministic spectrogram-frame utilities with explicit time/frequency axes.

statuses.point: Annotation-to-crop extraction is PARTIAL: no literal frequency-box crop.
statuses.note: literal_time_frequency_crop maps annotation time/frequency coordinates onto spectrogram axes; the legacy mask/highlight representation remains separate.

statuses.point: Fixed-size representation families are PARTIAL: no handcrafted-descriptor family, no hybrid family.
statuses.note: src.data.representations exports patch, handcrafted, and hybrid classical-ML-ready feature matrices.

statuses.point: No logistic regression, Bayes / Naive Bayes, KNN, SVM, Random Forest, gradient boosting, non-convolutional MLP.
statuses.note: All required models are available in the classical baseline driver.

statuses.point: No PCA-based representation path.
statuses.note: Representation export includes an optional PCA hook for patch and hybrid outputs.

statuses.point: No merged-category evaluation exists: ABZ, DDswp, 20Hz20Plus.
statuses.note: Classical evaluation now writes both 7-class and regrouped-family metrics with a documented mapping.

statuses.point: No explicit family-level or ambiguity-aware reporting framework is implemented.
statuses.note: Official-test reports now include grouped-family metrics, per-dataset views, and ambiguity-aware markdown reports.

statuses.point: Held-out official split is operationally called validation.
statuses.note: Config, README, imbalance audit, and evaluation metadata now distinguish the legacy name from the official test role.

statuses.point: No systematic ablation over spectrogram parameterizations.
Exact official dataset numbers and totals are not preserved in README.md.
Full dataset table reproduction is missing.
Full biological/acoustic semantic definitions are not preserved in the repository itself.
APLOSE workflow instructions are not represented.
Annotation campaign precision rules are not represented.
Explicit mention of Pyramid Match Kernel as a variable-size image strategy is missing.
Official event counts in the brief do not exactly match the repository manifest.
statuses.note: Requires original annotation CSVs or authoritative raw data to resolve honestly.

statuses.point: Raw dataset folder biodcase_development_set/ is absent.
Original annotation CSV files and WAV files are absent.
Best run outputs/runs/20260421-223457/ referenced in README is absent.
Single-fragment annotation discipline is UNVERIFIABLE FROM ZIP.
Bonus multi-event temporal localization task is not implemented.
Clustering methods are absent: KMeans, DBSCAN, HDBSCAN, Mean Shift.
Pyramid Match Kernel implementation.
